name: Kuber Resources Corp
business: The company, through its subsidiaries, treats wood panels to make them flame retardant using a patented process licensed from Shenzhen Junfeng Woodlink Network Technology Co Ltd. It also operates as an international trading platform for commodities, primarily precious metals. Revenue is generated from sales of these products and services throughout China.
namedSuppliers: Shenzhen Junfeng Woodlink Network Technology Co Ltd

exposures.sentence: Our main business as of late 2023 involves the treatment of flame retardant wood panels through a patented process which we license from Shenzhen Junfeng Woodlink Network Technology Co Ltd.

catalysts.event: Closing of acquisition of Gongfa Materials
catalysts.sentence: On January 14, 2025, following the satisfaction of the closing conditions, the transactions contemplated by the Acquisition Agreement and Exchange Agreement (defined below) closed ( Closing ).
